---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>crc-org/vfkit (github.com/crc-org/vfkit)</summary>

### [`v0.5.1`](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/releases/tag/v0.5.1): vfkit v0.5.1

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/compare/v0.5.0...v0.5.1)

The main change in this release is a change in the default cache settings used by vfkit to avoid a disk corruption issue in podman machine.

#### What's Changed

-   virtio: Enable full disk caching by [@​cgwalters](https://togithub.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/76](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/76)
-   tree-wide: Lowercase error strings by [@​cgwalters](https://togithub.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/77](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/77)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​cgwalters](https://togithub.com/cgwalters) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/76](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/76)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/compare/v0.5.0...v0.5.1

</details>
